opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My whole head is burning and leaking yellow fluid. I put this new hair growth serum on a few hours ago and now I'm in absolute agony.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe burning and weeping scalp within an hour of using an online hair serum.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 hours ago, ~60 minutes after applying the product
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning, stinging and weeping over the scalp where I applied it
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agony, very painful to light touch
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: vertex and front of scalp, exactly where I put the serum
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: weeping clear/yellowish fluid, no facial or throat swelling
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: none; usual hair thinning has never been sore or inflamed

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: gradual male-pattern hair thinning over ~5 years

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an unlabelled 'hair growth' serum bought online

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: bought an unregulated topical product internationally online

objective_data_offered.value: bright red, weeping skin exactly where I applied the serum, on the top and front of my scalp; small blisters, very tender
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot assess burn depth or palpate

objective_data_offered.value: no swelling of my eyes, lips or throat; breathing normally
